data.summary: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement for 'Deposit hold/capture integration' as part of the saga lifecycle. However, the evidence does not include any specific details or records that demonstrate this integration is in place. The absence of such evidence indicates a clear gap in meeting the requirement, as it is explicitly listed in the linked use case but remains unverified.
gaps: No evidence of deposit hold/capture integration.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify this requirement.
